ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "area" INTEGER /* Area of the property in square feet */,
  "listing_price" REAL /* The price at which the property is listed for sale */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the property (e.g., active, sold, pending) */,
  "listing_agent_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the real estate agent responsible for listing the property */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "tax_value" INTEGER /* Tax value of the property */,
  "taxamount" REAL /* Tax amount paid for the property */,
  "county_tax_rate" REAL /* The tax rate of the county where the property is located */,
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the county where the property is located */,
  "propertylandusedesc" TEXT /* Description of the property land use */,
  "transactiondate" TEXT /* Date of the property transaction */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the property's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the property's location */,
  "lotsizesquarefeet" REAL /* Size of the property lot in square feet */,
  "garagecarcnt" INTEGER /* Number of garage cars the property can accommodate */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the property is located */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the property record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the property record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_county FOREIGN KEY ("county") REFERENCES counties ("county_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_propertylandusedesc FOREIGN KEY ("propertylandusedesc") REFERENCES property_land_use ("land_use_desc")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State in which the county is located */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the county record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the county record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "property_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the property type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the property type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the property type record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., real estate agent, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the property */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the access log record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., number of bedrooms) */,
  "feature_value" TEXT /* Value of the feature */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the property feature record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the property feature record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_features_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_info" (
  "tax_info_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax info record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the tax info belongs to */,
  "tax_year" INTEGER /* Year the tax was paid */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Amount of tax paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the tax was paid */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method used to pay the tax (e.g., online, check) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the tax info record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the tax info record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_info_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_info_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the location belongs to */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the property's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the property's location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the property */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the property's location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the location record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the location record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lots" (
  "lot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lot */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the lot belongs to */,
  "lot_size_square_feet" REAL /* Size of the lot in square feet */,
  "lot_number" INTEGER /* Number of the lot */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the lot record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the lot record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lots_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garages" (
  "garage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garage */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the garage belongs to */,
  "garage_car_cnt" INTEGER /* Number of cars the garage can accommodate */,
  "garage_type" TEXT /* Type of garage (e.g., attached, detached) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the garage record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the garage record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("garage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garages_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fips_codes" (
  "fips_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each FIPS code */,
  "fips_code" INTEGER /* FIPS code */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the FIPS code belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the FIPS code record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the FIPS code record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fips_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fips_codes_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_land_use" (
  "land_use_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each land use record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the land use belongs to */,
  "land_use_desc" TEXT /* Description of the property land use */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the property land use record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the property land use record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("land_use_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_land_use_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the transaction belongs to */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., sale, rental) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the transaction record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the transaction record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)
